Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.chat

Class SOOPMissionEvent

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.chat.SOOPMissionEvent
public class SOOPMissionEvent extends Object
Mission event payload emitted by SOOP chat.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public SOOPMissionEvent.Type getType()
      Returns normalized mission event type.
      Returns:
      mapped mission event type, or SOOPMissionEvent.Type.UNKNOWN

    • getTypeRaw

      public String getTypeRaw()
      Returns original mission type code from payload.
      Returns:
      raw mission type string

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns mission title text.
      Returns:
      mission title

    • getImage

      public String getImage()
      Returns mission image URL.
      Returns:
      mission image URL

    • isRelay

      public boolean isRelay()
      Returns whether this event is a relay mission.
      Returns:
      true for relay mission events

    • getGiftCount

      public int getGiftCount()
      Returns gifted count contained in this mission event.
      Returns:
      mission gift count

    • getUserId

      public String getUserId()
      Returns triggering user ID.
      Returns:
      user ID

    • getUserNick

      public String getUserNick()
      Returns triggering user nickname.
      Returns:
      user nickname

    • getBjId

      public String getBjId()
      Returns broadcaster ID for this mission.
      Returns:
      broadcaster user ID

    • getBjNick

      public String getBjNick()
      Returns broadcaster nickname for this mission.
      Returns:
      broadcaster nickname

    • getMissionStatus

      public String getMissionStatus()
      Returns mission status code from payload.
      Returns:
      mission status value

    • getSettleCount

      public int getSettleCount()
      Returns settled count for settle events.
      Returns:
      settle count

    • getChno

      public int getChno()
      Returns channel numeric identifier from payload.
      Returns:
      channel number

    • getUuid

      public String getUuid()
      Returns mission unique identifier.
      Returns:
      mission UUID value

    • getKey

      public String getKey()
      Returns mission key converted to a string value.
      Returns:
      normalized mission key string, or null

    • fromJson

      public static SOOPMissionEvent fromJson(String json)
      Parses a mission event from raw JSON payload.
      Parameters:
      json - mission JSON text
      Returns:
      parsed mission event model
